languageDescription: Choose your interface language. Urdu and Arabic use right-to-left layout.
savedToAccount: and synced to your account when signed in.
themeDarkDesc: Dim surfaces optimized for low light
securityPageSubtitle: Change your password and set up authenticator two-factor authentication.
changePasswordDescription: Choose a new password (at least 8 characters). You must be signed in.
mfaDescription: Optional extra step at sign-in using Google Authenticator, Authy, or similar apps.
mfaStatusOnHint: You will be asked for a code from your app when signing in.
mfaScanHint: Scan the QR code with your authenticator app, then enter the 6-digit code.
mfaIncompleteHint: A previous 2FA setup was started but not finished. Continue to get a new QR code, or remove the incomplete setup.
mfaIncompleteRemoved: Incomplete setup removed. You can enable 2FA again.
